description: Per-setup strategy coverage expectations for the 96260B_rear part. 96260B_rear and 96260B_front are two SEPARATE parts with separate stock and separate jobs; this manifest covers the REAR part only. The expected strategies are exactly the strategy_types_used transcribed from the rear part's shop program (eval/gt/96260B_rear_shop_program.yaml). There is NO cross-part over-machining expectation here: the front part is not this part's second setup, so nothing is expected-absent 'because another setup owns it'. The front part has no transcribed shop program and therefore no coverage manifest (its coverage verdict is UNKNOWN, honestly).
